title: Soulection Radio Show #448 w/ Andres J Uribe
content:
Joe Kay and [Andres J Uribe](https://twitter.com/Andres_J_Uribe) providing the soundtrack for you with unreleased sounds from [Sango](https://twitter.com/SangoBeats) Da Rocinha 4

<!--more-->

Check out Shows [408](/episodes/408/), and [410](/episodes/410/) Soulection Radio [takeovers](/episodes/takeovers/) for more Andres J Uribe shows.

👁️‍🗨️ 🕊️ Stay safe, Stay in, Stay soulful
